use_cases: Date selection for booking appointments in healthcare or service applications
Range selection for hotel booking, flight search, or event planning tools
Date input in forms for e-commerce checkout or registration flows
Schedule visualization for calendar or project management applications
Time range filtering for analytics dashboards or reporting tools
ai_summary: A React Aria-based calendar component with full ARIA accessibility support. Features month navigation, range selection capability, keyboard navigation, and focus management. Built with composable sub-components (CalendarGrid, CalendarCell, CalendarHeader) for flexible date picking in forms, booking systems, and scheduling interfaces.
